calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross
Atty. William Wong, Esquire appearing as attorney for Petitioners Wai Ping Lorretta Chan and William Tsui.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: JENNIFER WING SZE TSUI.

Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Reset To Aug-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Wai Ping Loretta Chan, was sworn and examined and appeared with the minor Wing Sze Tsui. The court continued the matter to August 17, 2006 for the attorney of record to be present in court that date or the filing of a substitution of attorney.
